title.title: Writing a Great Post Title
title.description: Think of your post title as a super short (but compelling!) description — like an overview of the actual post in one short sentence. Use keywords where appropriate to help ensure people can find your post by search.

content.title: Editor Basics
content.description: Use Markdown to write and format posts. You can use Liquid tags to add rich content such as Tweets, YouTube videos, etc. In addition to images for the post's content, you can also drag and drop a cover image

tags.title: Tagging Guidelines
tags.description: Tags help people find your post. Think of tags as the topics or categories that best describe your post. Add up to four comma-separated tags per post. Combine tags to reach the appropriate subcommunities. Use existing tags whenever possible. Some tags, such as “help” or “healthydebate”, have special posting guidelines.
